name: Blender Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the meat to a hot platter.
2. Leaving the crusty bits of meat in the pan, pour the meat juices and fat into a large measuring cup. Skim off the fat, reserving 3 tablespoons.
3. Add water, milk, or giblet broth to the meat juices to equal 2 cups of liquid.
4. Pour the mixture into a blender container and blend until the liquid is smooth.
5. Return the blended gravy to the pan.
6. Cook the mixture quickly, stirring constantly, until the gravy thickens and becomes bubbly.
7. Scrape the bottom of the pan to retrieve any crusty bits, if desired.
8. Season the gravy to taste with salt and pepper.
9. If desired, add a dash of dried thyme leaves (crushed) and a few drops of Kitchen Bouquet for color.
10. Makes about 2 1/2 cups.
